summary: All three requirements (REQ-38, REQ-39, REQ-40) are substantially implemented. Dancing Script is imported, fontFamily.brand token added to tailwind.config.js, font-brand applied in Layout header, YearSelectionModal, and About page. Dot-grid is updated to 2px dots at 0.40 opacity fixed to viewport. SparkParticles component with 16 sparks, year labels, pointer-events:none, and upward float animations is created and mounted in Layout.tsx. One minor gap: the index.html title tag shows the brand name as plain text without a script font.

missing_requirements.requirement: Apply script/cursive font to 'Memu Nerchukunnavi' in index.html <title> display
missing_requirements.reason: The index.html <title> is 'Memu Nerchukunnavi | మేము నేర్చుకున్నవి' as plain text. Browser tab titles cannot use CSS font styling, and the diff shows no special handling such as a styled page-title overlay to address this specific requirement location called out in REQ-38.

hallucinated_features.description: Multiple additional spark color classes beyond soft lavender/violet, including sky-blue, teal, emerald, and pink variants
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-40 specifies sparks should use soft lavender/violet background styling only. The implementation adds sky-200, teal-200, emerald-200, and pink-200 color classes that were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Four distinct spark animation variants randomly assigned per spark
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-40 only specifies a gentle floating/drifting upward keyframe animation. Multiple named animation variants (spark-float-sway, spark-float-fast, spark-float-slow) were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Mute/unmute sound toggle button with Bell/BellOff icons in the Layout header
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the build request mentions sound functionality or a mute toggle in the header. This feature is unrelated to REQ-38, REQ-39, or REQ-40.
